title: Proverb of The Phase Space Blade

story.text: # 📜 Proverb of The Phase Space Blade
> The mirror that reflects the dragon does not just show a face; it shows the fire that forged the identity.
— inscribed on [[The Phase Space Blade]]  ·  *Dual Agent / The Original Universe Blade*
